system.duration: As long as the Sorcerer maintains Concentration.
system.effect: This spell causes the ground around the sorcerer to tremble. The Sorcerer remains unaffected. The Sorcerer may choose to have the Tremor radiate outward from them along the ground in all directions up to a radius of 30m, or blast outward along the ground in a flat cone 90m long and 60m wide. Creatures within the area of effect must throw DEX 8+ every round. Those who fail this throw are knocked down and suffer 1d6 damage. Those who succeed retain their footing and suffer no damage. At the Referee's discretion, Invoke Tectonics may damage buildings and has an AV 4d6 ability vs. vehicles. Note that a Sorcerer does not need to cast this spell while on the ground: casting this spell in deep water creates a small tsunami, which causes an AV 4d6 attack vs. ships!
system.critSuccess: Targets who fail the DEX throw suffer the full 3d6 damage rather than 1d6 when falling. Buildings in the affected area will usually crumble (Referee's discretion).
